title: Native DI codegen/runtime end-to-end
body:
Native dependency-injection codegen and runtime execute end-to-end (A2 track), wiring compile-time DI graphs into emitted native startup.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`8260a4a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/8260a4a)
- **Subject:** feat(v0.3): native DI codegen/runtime end-to-end (A2)
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-mods`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
